title: viburnum plicatum var. lanceatum
intro: Viburnum plicatum var. lanceatum, also known as the Ussuri flowering crabapple, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the Adoxaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Viburnum plicatum var. lanceatum are said to include reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
